action: Open each account, choose only a recent football or World Cup post where a pick-3 reply makes sense, personalize the first sentence, then reply manually from X.
proofRule: This watchlist is not proof. Log proof only after a real X reply URL exists, or after a precise private note says which account replied to which handle/post and when.
